---
title: "Data Resources"
page-layout: full
---
```{=html}
<div class="listing-intro">
  <p>Search or filter the Yale Library data listing by subject and access model.</p>
</div>

<div class="featured-platforms">

  <div class="featured-header">
    <h2>Featured Platforms</h2>
    <p>Start with commonly used platforms for data discovery, analysis, and access.</p>
  </div>

<div class="featured-grid">

  <div class="featured-card">
    <div class="featured-label">Hosted by Yale Library</div>
    <h3>Yale Data Green</h3>
    <p>Yale's Redivis-based platform for discovering and accessing curated research datasets.</p>
    <a class="featured-action"
       href="https://yale.redivis.com"
       target="_blank"
       rel="noopener">
       Explore Platform
    </a>
  </div>

  <div class="featured-card">
    <div class="featured-label">External platform</div>
    <h3>WRDS - Wharton Research Data Service</h3>
    <p>Financial, accounting, banking, economic, and market datasets for empirical research.</p>
    <a class="featured-action"
       href="https://wrds-www.wharton.upenn.edu/"
       target="_blank"
       rel="noopener">
       Explore Platform
    </a>
  </div>

  <div class="featured-card">
    <div class="featured-label">External platform</div>
    <h3>Dewey Data</h3>
    <p>Third-party research datasets across industries including consumer behavior, transportation, and workforce data.</p>
    <a class="featured-action"
       href="https://www.deweydata.io/"
       target="_blank"
       rel="noopener">
       Explore Platform
    </a>
  </div>

  <div class="featured-card">
    <div class="featured-label">External platform</div>
    <h3>ProQuest TDM Studio</h3>
    <p>Text and data mining platform providing access to licensed scholarly and news content for computational analysis, corpus building, and digital scholarship.</p>
    <a class="featured-action"
       href="https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-tdm-studio"
       target="_blank"
       rel="noopener">
       Explore Platform
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="listing-controls" class="listing-controls">

  <div class="filter-block search-block">
    <label for="listing-search">Search</label>
    <input type="search"
           id="listing-search"
           placeholder="Search by title, provider, topic, or description">
  </div>

  <div class="filter-block">
    <label for="subject-filter">Subject</label>
    <select id="subject-filter">
      <option value="">All subjects</option>
    </select>
  </div>

<div class="listing-controls">

  <div class="control-group">
    <label for="listing-search">Search</label>
    <input
      type="search"
      id="listing-search"
      placeholder="Search by title or description">
  </div>

  <div class="control-group">
    <label for="subject-filter">Research Area</label>
    <select id="subject-filter">
      <option value="">All research areas</option>
    </select>
  </div>

  <div class="control-group">
    <label for="type-filter">Resource Type</label>
    <select id="type-filter">
      <option value="">All resource types</option>
    </select>
  </div>

  <div class="control-group">
    <label for="access-filter">Access Model</label>
    <select id="access-filter">
      <option value="">All access models</option>
    </select>
  </div>

</div>

  <div class="filter-block">
    <label for="access-filter">Access</label>
    <select id="access-filter">
      <option value="">All access models</option>
    </select>
  </div>

  <button id="clear-filters" type="button">
    Clear filters
  </button>

</div>

<div id="result-count" class="result-count"></div>

<div id="dataset-grid" class="dataset-grid"></div>
```

<script src="assets/listing.js"></script>
